subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which of the following kings is associated with the construction of Amer Fort?
question_hi: अमेरिका किस राज्यां का संतुलना की जानकारी के लिए यह किस सितमबर्ग का संतुलना करता है।
explanation_en: Pratap Singh and Rao Jodhaji were prominent Rajput rulers of Rajasthan, but Raja Man Singh is the king who constructed Amer Fort in Jaipur. Therefore, the correct answer is Raja Man Singh.
